title: New feature needed: pin cards to the top of columns
excerpt: Monday needs a new feature. I’m a marketing manager at Afilio and we use Monday to manage the team’s internal demands and external demands requested by other teams for Marketing. We use the Work Management product for me…

posts.author: juguberman (Juliana Guberman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Monday needs a new feature. I’m a marketing manager at Afilio and we use Monday to manage the team’s internal demands and external demands requested by other teams for Marketing. We use the Work Management product for members of other teams to request marketing demands. For us, the ideal is for the demand cards to appear in chronological order of each person’s request. however, we have a card with the marketing requests manual that needs to be pinned to the top to always be visible to everyone before opening any demand cards. screenshot attached.
